description: Blacklane chauffeur quotes & service catalog — upfront fixed-price quotes (transfer & hourly) and vehicle-class catalog over Blacklane's public pricing BFF.

tools.name: catalog_get
tools.description: Get a vehicle class by slug (business, first, van). Required: slug. Returns the Package.

params.name: slug
params.description: Vehicle class slug: business, first, or van

tools.name: prices_create
tools.description: Request prices for a journey (raw body; see 'quote' for a friendly interface). Required: serviceCategory (default: prebooked), serviceType, departAt. Optional: duration. Returns the new PriceResult.

params.name: duration
params.description: Hourly only: duration in seconds (hours*3600, min 7200)
